channel.title: Whalesbook Financial News
channel.description: Latest Indian and global financial market news

item.title: Promoter Buys Vibhor Steel Tubes Shares, Lifts Stake to 1.88%
item.description: Mrs. Pratima Sandhir, a Whole Time Director and promoter group member of Vibhor Steel Tubes Limited, acquired 4,000 shares for Rs 4.31 lakhs, increasing her stake to 1.88%. This purchase signals promoter confidence despite recent stock price pressure and consecutive negative financial results. The acquisition was dated March 16, 2026.

item.title: Vibhor Steel Tubes: Promoter Pratima Sandhir Buys 4,000 Shares, Boosts Stake
item.description: Pratima Sandhir, a Director and promoter of Vibhor Steel Tubes, bought 4,000 shares on March 16, 2026. This move raises her stake to 1.88% of the company's equity. The purchase suggests ongoing promoter confidence, marking a small increase in her personal investment.

item.title: Maruti Suzuki faces ₹5,786 crore draft tax order; to challenge before panel
BSE Ltd. Rallies as NSE IPO Fuels Stock Surge and Market Share Gains
item.description: BSE Ltd. shares are climbing sharply, fueled by excitement over the upcoming National Stock Exchange (NSE) IPO. Investors see BSE as a way to bet on India's exchange sector. The company is also gaining significant market share in options trading, even with new regulations affecting the market. Analysts expect BSE's stock could be re-rated higher as it benefits from its rival's IPO, though valuation metrics show it is priced higher than NSE's underlying strength.

item.title: AstraZeneca Imfinzi gains India approval for liver cancer treatment
item.description: AstraZeneca Pharma India has received approval from the Central Drugs Standard Control Organisation (CDSCO) to import Durvalumab Solution (Imfinzi) for treating unresectable hepatocellular carcinoma (uHCC). This marks an expansion of Imfinzi's therapeutic applications in India, pending further statutory approvals. The move is significant for the company's oncology portfolio, addressing a critical unmet need in liver cancer treatment.

item.title: India Considers Joint Tax Returns for Fairer Family Relief
item.description: Rajya Sabha MP Raghav Chadha has proposed an optional joint income tax return (ITR) system for married couples, citing tax penalties on single-earner families. The Institute of Chartered Accountants of India (ICAI) has long advocated for this, recommending it for Budget 2026. Experts suggest it would simplify compliance, promote fairer taxation, and align India with global practices like those in the US and UK. The proposal aims to offer tax relief and acknowledge households as economic units.

item.title: Promoter Sudhir Mody Exits Vivid Global, Sells 8.17% Stake
item.description: Promoter Sudhir Mody has sold his entire 8.17% stake in Vivid Global Industries. The transaction, completed on March 16, 2026, marks his full exit from direct ownership in the company.

item.title: Sungold Media Promoter Boosts Stake to 47.84% in Open Market Buy
item.description: Sungold Media And Entertainment Limited announced that its promoter, Raj Kotia, acquired 5,000 shares through an open market purchase on March 17, 2026. This transaction slightly increased his total holding to 47.84% of the company's voting capital. While reinforcing promoter commitment, the acquisition is marginal and offers little immediate directional change for shareholders in the media and entertainment services company.

item.title: TBO Tek Shareholders Back Director Pramanik to Serve Past 75
item.description: TBO Tek Limited secured strong shareholder backing to retain Bhaskar Pramanik as a Non-Executive Independent Director beyond the age of 75. The special resolution passed with 99.95% of votes in favour, ensuring continuity of experienced leadership. This move is crucial for maintaining seasoned guidance on the board.

item.title: Varun Somani Steps Down as Oricon Director Amid Family Pact
item.description: Oricon Enterprises Ltd announced the resignation of Director Mr. Varun Somani, effective March 17, 2026. This move is part of a Memorandum of Family Settlement dated September 01, 2025, aimed at resolving promoter shareholding and directorship matters. Mr. Somani will also exit board committees, signaling a governance alignment within the Parijat Enterprises group.

item.title: India Tightens LPG Rules: e-KYC, PNG Switch Amid Energy Crisis
item.description: India's Ministry of Petroleum and Natural Gas now requires biometric Aadhaar e-KYC for all domestic LPG users, including stricter annual checks for Pradhan Mantri Ujjwala Yojana beneficiaries. Households with Piped Natural Gas (PNG) must surrender their LPG cylinders, advancing an energy shift. These steps aim to better manage subsidies and prevent leakage, crucial as Middle East turmoil raises global energy prices and pressures India's import-reliant economy.

item.title: Regency Fincorp Gets BSE Nod to List 6.6M Shares Post Warrant Conversion
item.description: Regency Fincorp has received initial approval from the BSE to list 6.62 million new equity shares. These shares come from converted warrants issued to promoters and others, adding to the company's share capital and market float. Staying compliant with SEBI rules for trading approval is key.

item.title: Taparia Tools Gets ₹1.31 Cr GST Penalty Dropped With No Financial Impact
item.description: Taparia Tools received a final order from the Central GST authority dropping ₹1.31 crore in penalty proceedings. The company confirmed no financial impact, as tax officials accepted its records and found no evasion intent.

item.title: Suyog Telematics Shareholders Approve New Director, MoA Changes
item.description: Suyog Telematics Limited shareholders overwhelmingly approved appointing Mr. Sanjeev Sunderji Thakker as an Independent Director and updating the company's Memorandum of Association. The strong vote signals investor confidence in the board's direction and future strategy.

item.title: Ethos Opens 91st Store in Kanpur to Expand Luxury Watch Network
item.description: Ethos Limited has opened its 91st watch boutique in Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh. This strategic expansion aims to enhance its presence in India's growing luxury retail market and make exclusive watch brands more accessible nationwide.

item.title: India Glycols Bags ₹36 Cr Dividend from JV, Boosts Cash Reserves
item.description: India Glycols Limited received ₹36 crore in interim dividends from its joint venture, M/s Clariant IGL Specialty Chemical Private Limited, on March 17, 2026. The wholly-owned subsidiary also received ₹2.88 crore. This cash inflow is expected to bolster the company's liquidity and financial reserves.

item.title: P&G Hygiene Names Robin Thadathil New HR Head
item.description: Procter & Gamble Hygiene and Health Care Limited announced a leadership change in Human Resources. Srinivas Maruthi Patnam will step down March 31, 2026, and Robin Thadathil will become the new Head of HR starting April 1, 2026. Thadathil brings over 16 years of global HR experience within P&G, aiming to ensure continuity and implement worldwide best practices.

item.title: Annvrridhhi Ventures ₹3.50 Share Call Due April 8; Forfeiture Risk High
item.description: Annvrridhhi Ventures has issued a First Call Money Notice to holders of its partly paid-up equity shares, demanding ₹3.50 per share by April 8, 2026. Trading in these shares has been suspended on exchanges since March 10, 2026, increasing pressure on shareholders to meet the deadline. Failure to pay could result in interest charges and forfeiture of shares, including any amounts already paid.

item.title: Emerald Finance Partners Paras Enterprises for Early Wage Access
item.description: Emerald Finance Limited has partnered with Chandigarh-based Paras Enterprises to launch an Early-Wage-Access (EWA) program. This initiative lets employees get part of their salaries before payday, helping Emerald Finance grow its retail customer base. The move taps into India's demand for flexible financial solutions, using Emerald Finance’s lending expertise.

item.title: Choice International Wins Rs 55 Crore Government Contracts in Strategic Pivot
item.description: Choice International Limited's subsidiaries have secured Rs 55 crore in government contracts across infrastructure, e-governance, and digital transformation. These diverse projects, including school infrastructure DPRs and AI media monitoring, mark a strategic pivot into public sector consulting. While enhancing project visibility and investor confidence, the move sparks questions about core business dilution and execution challenges with a varied, long-term project portfolio.

item.title: Ventura Guaranty Shareholders Vote on New Director via E-Voting
item.description: Ventura Guaranty Limited is seeking shareholder approval through a postal ballot for the appointment of Mrs. Shilpa Majethia as a Non-Executive, Non-Independent Director. The e-voting process will commence on March 18, 2026, and conclude on April 16, 2026, with results announced by April 20, 2026. This move aligns with corporate governance practices requiring member consent for board changes.

item.title: Regal Entertainment Pushes ₹8.5 Cr Rights Issue to Avoid NBFC License Loss
item.description: Regal Entertainment & Consultants Ltd. is raising up to ₹8.5 crore through a rights issue. This capital is essential to meet the Reserve Bank of India's ₹5 crore minimum Net Owned Fund (NOF) requirement, which the company currently does not meet. Without these funds, Regal risks losing its NBFC operating license.

item.title: Gillette India Taps P&G Veteran Robin Thadathil as New HR Head
item.description: Gillette India Limited is set to see a transition in its top HR role. Srinivas Maruthi Patnam, Head of Human Resources, will step down on March 31, 2026. He will be succeeded by Robin Thadathil, effective April 1, 2026. Thadathil brings over 16 years of extensive global HR experience from various positions within Procter & Gamble, promising a strategic infusion into the company's people management practices.

item.title: Banas Finance CFO Amit Mehta Steps Down March 31, 2026
item.description: Banas Finance Limited confirmed Chief Financial Officer Amit Mehta's resignation, effective March 31, 2026, due to personal reasons. The company indicated no other factors were disclosed.

item.title: India's UPI Payments Launch in Sri Lanka for Tourists
item.description: NPCI International Payments Limited (NIPL) is boosting UPI acceptance across Sri Lanka, focusing on Indian tourists. This move will simplify cross-border payments using LankaQR, Sri Lanka's national QR standard. With Indian visitors a key demographic (over 5.31 lakh in 2025), the goal is to reduce cash reliance and offer easy payments directly from Indian bank accounts with real-time rates. Sri Lankan merchants stand to gain access to more customers and better cash flow. This step supports Sri Lanka's digital goals and NIPL's international payment strategy.

item.title: Nifty Realty Tumbles 18% to Multi-Year Lows: Recovery Outlook Mixed
item.description: The Nifty Realty index has sharply declined, hitting multi-year lows. While technical signals hint at a potential short-term pullback for some developers like Sobha and Oberoi Realty, a full recovery faces headwinds from rising inflation and issues in affordable housing, requiring investors to be selective.

item.title: ASI Industries Buys 0.006% Lloyds Metals Stake for ₹3.38 Cr
item.description: ASI Industries Limited has acquired 30,000 equity shares, representing a 0.006% stake, in Lloyds Metals and Energy Ltd for ₹3.38 crore. The investment is purely for investment purposes, with no intention to acquire control of the target entity.

item.title: Health Insurance Premiums Skyrocket: Age, Rules Drive 50-200% Hikes
item.description: Policyholders across India face steep health insurance premium hikes, with increases of 50-200% reported over three years. Age-based bracket shifts and regulatory changes, like reduced waiting periods for pre-existing conditions, are primary drivers. Insurers cite medical inflation and increased claims post-pandemic, but a lack of transparency compounds policyholder frustration, with renewal quotes often diverging significantly from advance checks.

item.title: India's ULIPs vs. Mutual Funds: Investors Rethink Strategy
item.description: The long-standing debate between Unit Linked Insurance Plans (ULIPs) and mutual funds, particularly ELSS, is evolving beyond tax benefits. Regulatory shifts, such as new premium limits on ULIPs, coupled with persistent market volatility, are compelling investors to scrutinize cost structures, flexibility, and long-term wealth creation potential. While ULIPs bundle insurance and investment, mutual funds offer pure investment vehicles with greater liquidity and transparency, increasingly favored for modular financial planning.

item.title: India's Education Boom Risks Wasting Youth Demographic Dividend
item.description: India has greatly expanded access to higher education. But a new report warns that if the country can't create enough quality jobs for its growing number of graduates, it risks wasting its 'demographic dividend.' With the peak of its working-age population approaching, rapid job creation is vital. The report points to issues like lower male enrollment, concerns about education quality, high graduate unemployment, and insecure jobs.

item.title: Jio Payments Bank Offers UPI Cash Withdrawal at Local BC Points
item.description: Jio Payments Bank (JPBL) has launched a new way for customers to withdraw cash using UPI. Simply scan a UPI QR code at a local Business Correspondent (BC) agent and authorize with your UPI app. This service aims to make cash access easier and boost financial inclusion, especially in rural areas.

item.title: KPI Green Energy Lands ₹979 Cr Loan for 150 MW Gujarat Wind Project
item.description: KPI Green Energy has secured ₹979 crore financing from Canara Bank for its 150 MW wind power project in Gujarat. This funding, crucial for the project's ₹1,241.68 crore total cost, supports the company's expansion towards its 10 GW renewable energy target by 2030 and reinforces stable annuity revenues.

item.title: Power Finance Corp Board OKs ₹1.6 Lakh Crore Borrowing, Declares ₹3.25 Dividend
item.description: Power Finance Corporation (PFC) announced its board has approved a ₹1,60,000 crore borrowing plan for FY 2026-27. The company also declared a ₹3.25 per share fourth interim dividend for FY 2025-26, providing a direct return to shareholders. This financial move aims to boost PFC's resources for operations and growth, pending shareholder approval for the borrowing.

item.title: Natural Capsules: Infomerics Reaffirms BB+(Stable) Credit Rating Amid Challenges
item.description: Infomerics has reaffirmed Natural Capsules' credit rating for its banking facilities. The company's ₹56.35 crore in long-term debt keeps a BB+(Stable) rating, while ₹2.80 crore in short-term debt is rated A4+. This stability comes as the company works to manage its finances through recent operational and financial challenges.

item.title: India Extends Export Relief Due to Hormuz Disruptions
item.description: India has extended relief measures for export cargo until March 31, 2026, responding to major disruptions at the Strait of Hormuz caused by ongoing geopolitical conflict. The Central Board of Indirect Taxes and Customs (CBIC) has simplified procedures, allowing temporary unloading and waiving import paperwork for returning shipments. While this provides immediate support, the extension highlights India's reliance on maritime trade routes and the rising costs of regional instability for its export-driven economy. Diversifying supply chains remains a key strategic goal.

item.title: Vaxfab Enterprises Converts Warrants, Allots 27.3 Lakh Shares at ₹21.02
item.description: Vaxfab Enterprises' Board approved allotting 27,33,903 equity shares at ₹21.02 each, converting warrants into fully paid equity. This significantly boosts the company's paid-up share capital. While strengthening its finances, the new shares may dilute existing shareholders' stakes.

item.title: AAA Technologies Proposes Mr. Dhoot for MD, Seeks Shareholder Vote
item.description: AAA Technologies Limited is seeking shareholder approval to re-designate Mr. Venugopal Madanlal Dhoot as Managing Director. The move, effective March 6, 2026, aims to leverage his experience for future growth and governance. Shareholders will vote via postal ballot from March 19 to April 18, 2026.

item.title: Neogem India Appoints Company Secretary to Rectify Compliance Gap
item.description: Neogem India Limited has appointed Ms. Shivali Mishra as Company Secretary, Compliance Officer, and Key Managerial Personnel, effective March 17, 2026. This appointment addresses a noted compliance gap where the company was previously without a qualified Company Secretary as required by law.

item.title: IIRM Holdings India Q3 Profit Surges 53.7% on Strong Broking Business Growth
item.description: IIRM Holdings India Limited reported strong Q3 FY26 results, with total income up 20.8% year-on-year to ₹609.4 Mn and Profit After Tax (PAT) surging 53.7% to ₹47.1 Mn. The company's focus on its core broking business is yielding results, as broking revenue climbed 47.4% to account for about 78% of total revenue. This shift signals a move toward more scalable, profitable operations.
